intro: Join Lumi and friends on a magical floating adventure about friendship, courage, and finding your inner strength!
description:
The Magic School tells the enchanting story of Lumi, a little dragon attending a floating magical academy where her spells always seem to turn into bubbles. When a dark storm threatens to destroy the very heart that keeps the school afloat, Lumi and her mismatched group of friends must learn to combine their unique talents. Ultimately, they will discover that the most powerful magic isn't found in books, but in the courage to accept oneself and the strength of true friendship.

• An interactive picture book for ages 4–8.
• 10 chapters. Approximately 12,000 words of story.
• Short sessions. Perfect for one chapter per evening. Read together or alone.
• Original illustrations using cute 3D style.
• Original music and sounds.
• Themes: courage, friendship, listening, caring for a fragile place.
• No ads · No in-app purchases · No frightening content · No sad ending.
